meta.name: Launch Checklist Automator
meta.description: Track a product launch checklist, assign owners, send reminders for overdue items, and provide a real-time launch readiness score.

parameters.content:
## 18 — Launch Checklist Automator

**Required:**
- LAUNCH_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns: item, category, owner, due_date, status (not_started|in_progress|done|blocked), priority (critical|high|medium|low), notes
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Daily at 08:00 starting T-14 days before launch.

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🚀 Launch Readiness {{ $json.readiness_score }}% — {{ $json.date }}{{ $json.launch_ready ? ' ✅ READY' : '' }}
